package main

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"fmt"
	"log"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"runtime"
	"sync/atomic"
	"time"
)

var activeGoroutines int64

func main() {
	port := "8080"
	if p := os.Getenv("PORT"); p != "" {
		port = p
	}

	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	mux.HandleFunc("/compute", computeHandler)
	mux.HandleFunc("/health", healthHandler)
	mux.HandleFunc("/stats", statsHandler)

	server := &http.Server{
		Addr:         ":" + port,
		Handler:      mux,
		ReadTimeout:  10 * time.Second,
		WriteTimeout: 30

cmd: sed -i 's/func computeHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r \*http.Request) {/func computeHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r \*http.Request) {\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(r.Context())\n\tdefer cancel()/' /app/app/main.go
sed -i 's/result := performComputation(req)/result := performComputation(ctx, req)/' /app/app/main.go
sed -i 's/func performComputation(req ComputeRequest) ComputeResult {/func performComputation(ctx context.Context, req ComputeRequest) ComputeResult {' /app/app/main.go
